title: Missing BUILD_ASSERT for CONFIG_LICHEN_MESHCORE_MAX_SERIAL_PAYLOAD uint16_t limit
description:
File: lichen/subsys/lichen/meshcore/codec.c
Line: 67

```c
sys_put_le16((uint16_t)payload_len, &out[1]);
```

The serial frame header encodes payload length as a 16-bit little-endian value. If CONFIG_LICHEN_MESHCORE_MAX_SERIAL_PAYLOAD > 65535, the cast to uint16_t will truncate, causing:
1. The wrong length to be encoded in the frame
2. The receiver to parse incorrect data
3. Potential buffer over-read on the receiving end

The BUILD_ASSERT at adapter.c:41-43 only checks MAX_SERIAL_PAYLOAD <= FRAME_MAX, not that it fits in uint16_t.

Fix: Add BUILD_ASSERT(CONFIG_LICHEN_MESHCORE_MAX_SERIAL_PAYLOAD <= UINT16_MAX, "Serial payload cannot exceed 16-bit length field");
